Ficha Tecnica

CampoValor
CategoriaProyecto
Proyectodissectiones_logi
Fragmentos8
FuenteS:\dissectiones_logi\ISAN Centrum Monitoris\centro_monitor.py
Sincronizado2026-05-01 02:25

Contenido

-- coding: utf-8 -- # ========================================================== # ✠ INITIUM MONITORIS INTELLIGENTIS ✠ # Centrum Monitoris Bursalitici et Academici # ISAN atelier academiae C.A # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # ========================================================== from json.tool import main import os, json, datetime # I. CONFIGURATIO FUNDAMENTALIS # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ⚖️ Radices et Portae: definimus vias sacras ad Archivum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Lex Interna: Tabula Regulae, lumen normativum # II. STRUCTURA SACRA # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Aedificatio templorum: creantur portae, sacraria et tabulae # ------------------------------------------------------------ def assecurare_structuram(): """✠ Custos: creans sacraria et tabulas monitoris ✠""" # III. INVENTARIUM PROIECTORUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 🜏 Enumeratio: revelantur nomina proiectorum sub tutela # ------------------------------------------------------------ def projecta_disponibilia(): """🜏 Index Proiectorum: enumeratio sacra""" # IV. LECTIO TEXTUUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 📜 Lectio Hermetica: verba et dicta ex tabulis # ------------------------------------------------------------ def lectio_textus(path, fname, max_chars=None): """📜 Lectio sacra cum tolerantia errorum"""

========================================================== # ✠ FINIS INITII MONITORIS ✠ # Hic terminatur prima pars: Configuratio, Structura, Inventarium # Proxima pars: Lectio et Dictamen Bursaliticum # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ PARS II — DICTAMEN BURSALITICUM ✠ # Lectio et Interpretatio: SUNAVAL, BVC, Global # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # ========================================================== # V. LECTIO INFORMIUM BURSALITICORUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 🜏 Tabulae mercatorum: voces SUNAVAL, fluctus BVC, aura Global # ------------------------------------------------------------ def informes_proiecti(proiectum: str): """🜏 Lectio trium tabularum bursaliticarum""" # VI. INTERPRETATIO DICTAMINIS # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ⚖️ Examen Hermeticum: signa, fluctus et responsa # ------------------------------------------------------------ def dictamen_bursaliticum(informes: dict): """⚖️ Interpretatio: Alcista, Neutra, Bajista""" # Signa SUNAVAL # Signa BVC # Signa Global # Determinatio # VII. BITACORA RITUALIS # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Scriptum in tabulis: memoria temporis et responsorum # ------------------------------------------------------------ def inscribere_bitacoram(linea: str, nomen: str = “monitor_log.txt”): """✝️ Inscribere in tabula logorum

cum Sigillo Ordinis""" def snapshot_proiecti(proiectum: str, contentum: str): """🜏 Custodia momenti: snapshot sacrum""" # ========================================================== # ✠ FINIS PARS II — DICTAMEN BURSALITICUM ✠ # Hic clauditur interpretatio bursalis: Lectio, Dictamen, Bitacora # Proxima pars: Normae Ordinis et Extracta Regulae # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ PARS III — NORMAE ORDINIS ✠ # Extracta Regulae, Articuli Applicati, Observantia # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # ========================================================== # VIII. LECTIO REGULAE INTERNORUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 📜 Tabula Regulae: lumen normativum, lex interna # ------------------------------------------------------------ def extractum_regulae(max_chars: int = 1600) → str: """📜 Lectio Regulae Internae""" # IX. REGULAMENTUM APPLICATUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ⚖️ Articuli et Observantia: quae lex applicata est # ------------------------------------------------------------ def regulamentum_applied(proiectum: str) → dict: """⚖️ Lectio articuli applicati pro proiecto""" # X. SYNTHESIS NORMATIVA # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 🜏 Coniunctio: articuli, observantia, extractum # ------------------------------------------------------------ def synthesis_normativa(articuli: list,

observantia: str, extractum: str) → str: """🜏 Synthesis Hermetica Normarum""" # ========================================================== # ✠ OCULUS ARCHIVORUM ✠ # Visio interna: exploratio profunda Bibliothecae Archivorum # Index, synopsis et custodia snapshot in logs/snapshots # ========================================================== ARCHIVUM_LATEST_JSON = os.path.join(ARCHIVUM_SNAPSHOT_DIR, “Archivum_latest.json”) def _safe_stat(path: str) → dict: """🜏 Statum tutum: mtime et magnitudo cum tolerantia""" “mtime”: datetime.datetime.fromtimestamp(st.st_mtime).isoformat(), “size”: st.st_size def explorare_archivum(root: str = ARCHIVUM_DIR, """✠ Exploratio profunda: inventarium archivorum et tabularum - Perambulat recursivum radicem Bibliothecae Archivorum - Colectio: subcarpetas, archivos filtrados por extensión, conteos y tiempos - Limita por directorio para evitar listas excesivas """ # Filtrar por extensión de interés # Ordenar por mtime (más recientes primero) # Recortar número de archivos por directorio # Construir lista con metadata por archivo # Actualizar sumarios globales def synopsis_archivorum(inventarium: dict) → str: """🜏 Synopsis: compendium textual de statu Archivorum""" def inscribere_archivum_snapshot() → str: """✠ Custodia: salva snapshot JSON de Bibliotheca Archivorum - Escribe archivo con fecha (Archivum_snapshot_YYYY-MM-DD.json) - Actualiza referencia ‘Archivum_latest.json’ """ # Actualizar el último # Tolerar error sin interrumpir flujo def

recentiora_archivorum(max_lines: int = 12) → str: """✠ Recentiora: extracto legibile de cambios recientes - Lee ‘Archivum_latest.json’ y compone un breve reporte """ # Seleccionar hasta max_lines directorios con actividad reciente (por mtime) # ========================================================== # ✠ FINIS OCULI ARCHIVORUM ✠ # Custodia completa: exploratio, synopsis et snapshot perpetuum # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ FINIS PARS III — NORMAE ORDINIS ✠ # Hic clauditur pars normativae: Regula, Articuli, Synthesis # Proxima pars: Disclaimers et Sellos Transitus # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ PARS IV — DISCLAIMERS ET SELLOS TRANSITUS ✠ # Limina interius et exterius: portae rituales # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # ========================================================== # XI. DEFINITIONES DISCLAMATORUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Sellos de transición: signa quae distinguunt ordinem ab alea # ------------------------------------------------------------ def textus_disclaimer() → str: """✝️ Scriptum Disclamatorum: porta interius et exterius""" # XII. INSIGNIA RITUALIA # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 🜏 Signa templaria quae comitantur clausuram et transitus #

------------------------------------------------------------ def sigillum_transitus(eventus: str, proiectum: str = None): """🜏 Sigillum rituale adnotans transitus""" # ========================================================== # ✠ FINIS PARS IV — DISCLAIMERS ET SELLOS TRANSITUS ✠ # Hic clauditur pars liminum: definitiones, textus, sigilla # Proxima pars: Interfacia Visiva et Centrum Monitoris # ======================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ PARS V (Pars I) — INTERFACIA VISIVA ET CENTRUM MONITORIS ✠ # Templum Visivum: PySide6, Tabulae, Arbor, Dictamen, Archivum # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # Initium: imports, inventarium departamentorum, class initium # ========================================================== from PySide6.QtWidgets import ( from PySide6.QtGui import QPixmap from PySide6.QtCore import QTimer from PySide6.QtCharts import QChart, QChartView, QLineSeries import os, json, datetime # ✠ INVENTARIUM DEPARTAMENTORUM ✠ def explorare_departamenta(root: str = OPER_DIR): """✠ Exploratio profunda Departamentorum ✠""" def actualizare_index(): """✠ Actualizatio syntaxis: guarda inventario en JSON ✠""" # XIII. TEMPLUM VISIVUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Centrum Monitoris: tabulae, arbores, sigilla, archivum # ------------------------------------------------------------ class CentrumMonitoris(QWidget): """✠ Centrum Monitoris — Interfacia Visiva

✠""" def init(self): # Arbor principalis # Caput sacrum # Selector proiecti # Intervalum # Disclaimers # Dictamen bursalis + Sigillum Archivum (ícono templario + aviso continuo) # ✠ Sigillum Archivum — símbolo templario de orden (ícono opcional) # Aviso continuo # Tabulae # Arbor Visor dinámico # Graphica # Botones # Timer # Ajuste dinámico del timer # XIV. Arbor Visor dinámico # -------------------------------------------------------- def populate_tree(self): # Ejecutar actualización dinámica # Crear nodos para cada Departamentum # Subnodo con scripts # Subnodo con conteos # Nodo disclaimers # XV. Disclaimers # -------------------------------------------------------- def mostra_disclaimers(self): # XVI. Renovatio # -------------------------------------------------------- def renovare(self): # Punto en la serie temporal # ✠ Oculus Archivorum — snapshot automático + actualización del tab + aviso continuo # Renovar árbol dinámico (opcional: mantiene sincronía con cambios en disco) # XVII. Snapshot # -------------------------------------------------------- def snapshot(self): # XVIII. Reset Timer # -------------------------------------------------------- def _reset_timer(self, val): # ============================================================ # ✠ FINIS PARS V — INTERFACIA VISIVA ET CENTRUM MONITORIS ✠ # Hic clauditur pars visiva: templum, tabulae, arbor dynamicus, # graphica, archivum, sigillum et inventarium Departamentorum #

========================================================== # ======================================================== # ✠ PARS VI — EXECUTIO FINALIS ET INITIUM MONITORIS ✠ # Actus Rituales: Initium, Apertura, Manifestatio # Hermeticum – Alchimicum – Templarium # ======================================================== # XVIII. INITIUM SACRUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Apertura Monitoris: invocatio, manifestatio, celebratio # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Custos structurae: templum paratur # Invocatio: initium applicationis # Manifestatio: Centrum Monitoris visibile fit # Celebratio: cursus perpetuus # ======================================================== # ✠ FINIS MONITORIS INTELLIGENTIS ✠ # Hic clauditur opus: Initium, Dictamen, Normae, Disclaimers, Interfacia # Centrum Monitoris completum est, paratum ad mare bursaliticum et academium # ==========================================================

CONFIGURATIO FUNDAMENTALIS # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ⚖️ Radices et Portae: definimus vias sacras ad Archivum # ------------------------------------------------------------ # Lex Interna: Tabula Regulae, lumen normativum # II. STRUCTURA SACRA # ------------------------------------------------------------ # ✝️ Aedificatio templorum: creantur portae, sacraria et tabulae # ------------------------------------------------------------ def assecurare_structuram(): """✠ Custos: creans sacraria et tabulas monitoris ✠""" # III. INVENTARIUM PROIECTORUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 🜏 Enumeratio: revelantur nomina proiectorum sub tutela # ------------------------------------------------------------ def projecta_disponibilia(): """🜏 Index Proiectorum: enumeratio sacra""" # IV. LECTIO TEXTUUM # ------------------------------------------------------------ # 📜 Lectio Hermetica: verba et dicta ex tabulis # ------------------------------------------------------------ def lectio_textus(path, fname, max_chars=None): """📜 Lectio sacra cum tolerantia errorum"""
